records.question: Which departments are in the Whitman building that have at least one course, have at least one instructor named Wieland with a salary of at least 124651.41, and have at least one student with at most 99 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Whitman' AND instructor.salary >= 124651.41 AND instructor.name = 'Wieland' AND student.tot_cred <= 99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN course c ON d.dept_name = c.dept_name
JOIN instructor i ON d.dept_name = i.dept_name
JOIN student s ON d.dept_name = s.dept_name
WHERE d.building = 'Whitman'
  AND i.name = 'Wieland'
  AND i.salary >= 124651.41
  AND s.tot_cred <= 99

records.question: Which departments that have courses, instructors, and students have a budget of at most 406557.93?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget <= 406557.93
records.pred_sql:
SELECT dept_name
FROM department
WHERE budget <= 406557.93
  AND dept_name IN (SELECT dept_name FROM course WHERE dept_name IS NOT NULL)
  AND dept_name IN (SELECT dept_name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name IS NOT NULL)
  AND dept_name IN (SELECT dept_name FROM student WHERE dept_name IS NOT NULL)

records.question: Which departments in the Mercer building have an instructor named Pimenta and also have enrolled students?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE instructor.name = 'Pimenta' AND department.building = 'Mercer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN instructor i ON d.dept_name = i.dept_name
JOIN student s ON d.dept_name = s.dept_name
WHERE d.building = 'Mercer' AND i.name = 'Pimenta'

records.question: Which departments have a budget of 573745.09, are located in Whitman, offer the Calculus course with 4 credits, and have a student named Szczerban with at most 97 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Szczerban' AND course.credits = 4 AND department.budget = 573745.09 AND department.building = 'Whitman' AND course.title = 'Calculus' AND student.tot_cred <= 97
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN course c ON d.dept_name = c.dept_name
JOIN student s ON s.dept_name = d.dept_name
WHERE d.budget = 573745.09
  AND d.building = 'Whitman'
  AND c.title = 'Calculus'
  AND c.credits = 4
  AND s.name = 'Szczerban'
  AND s.tot_cred <= 97

JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name

records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN instructor i ON d.dept_name = i.dept_name
JOIN student s ON d.dept_name = s.dept_name
WHERE d.building = 'Taylor'

  AND i.salary <= 59303.62
  AND s.tot_cred <= 95

records.question: Which departments have a budget of at least 441840.92 that offer the 3-credit course titled Astronautics, have an instructor named Hau, and have a student named Ashmi with at most 95 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget >= 441840.92 AND course.credits = 3 AND student.tot_cred <= 95 AND instructor.name = 'Hau' AND student.name = 'Ashmi' AND course.title = 'Astronautics'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
JOIN course c ON d.dept_name = c.dept_name
JOIN instructor i ON d.dept_name = i.dept_name
JOIN student s ON d.dept_name = s.dept_name
WHERE d.budget >= 441840.92
  AND c.credits = 3
  AND c.title = 'Astronautics'
  AND i.name = 'Hau'
  AND s.name = 'Ashmi'
  AND s.tot_cred <= 95
